stories.title: Yamal nets 1st World Cup goal to fuel Spain rout
stories.summary: Lamine Yamal needed just 10 minutes of his first start at a World Cup to get his first goal on soccer's biggest stage.

stories.title: McCollum stays with Hawks on 1-year extension
stories.summary: Hawks guard CJ McCollum has agreed to a one-year, $21 million contract extension with the franchise, his agent told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Sources: Goodwin joining Gillespie in Suns return
stories.summary: The Suns have reached a second deal this weekend, as free agent guard Jordan Goodwin intends to join Collin Gillespie in re-signing in Phoenix, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Conceição: No obligation to pass ball to Ronaldo
stories.summary: Portugal's Francisco Conceição on Sunday rejected suggestions that the team feels compelled to constantly look for Cristiano Ronaldo on the pitch at this 2026 FIFA World Cup.

stories.title: Kraken pick up RFA Samoskevich in Panthers deal
stories.summary: The Kraken have acquired 23-year-old forward Mackie Samoskevich in a trade with the Panthers that will send the No. 25 pick in Friday's NHL draft back to Florida.
